steps.title: Match the pronoun to artworks
steps.content: The blank is the subject of the introductory clause: When ______ debuted. The main clause identifies the thing being discussed as the artworks, which is plural, so the pronoun in the blank must also be plural.

steps.title: Use the plural subject pronoun
steps.content: Choice B is a relative pronoun, not the standalone subject pronoun needed here. Choices C and D are singular, so they do not agree with the artworks. The plural subject pronoun fits the sentence. The answer is A.
